quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure — revenue and unit counts per product plus the derived gap 'West trailed at $1,414.82, roughly 35% below North.'

specificity.why: Every recommendation names a specific product/region with figures, e.g. 'Review Sprocket pricing; 238 units sold produced only $1,130.50, the lowest product revenue despite the highest volume.'

insight_density.why: Surfaces multiple non-obvious, actionable observations: Gadget's revenue-per-unit ('the most revenue from the fewest units'), Sprocket's volume-vs-revenue outlier, and West's 35% gap to North.
